used_by_pages: Dashboard; LabTools; Bioinformatics; Meta Analysis; Settings
current_runtime_problem: Runtime sidebar exists but module labels, icon rhythm, active state, and auxiliary entries are not governed by a shared shell contract.
target_mockup_behavior: Stable product navigation with compact module entries, clear active state, bottom auxiliary entries, and no project-center/report-center overexposure.
must_not_change_semantics: Keep module routing, Developer Preview meaning, and no account/subscription enablement.

used_by_pages: All module pages
current_runtime_problem: Pages are assembled with ad hoc QVBox/QHBox layouts, causing inconsistent margins, scroll behavior, and dense-page clipping.
target_mockup_behavior: One page container with consistent content margins, scroll policy, body regions, and maximum readable width rules for workbench pages.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not change page routing, backend execution, file writes, or packaging behavior.

used_by_pages: Dashboard; LabTools; Bioinformatics; Meta Analysis; Settings
current_runtime_problem: Headers vary by page; status chips and subtitles compete with page content or disappear on dense screens.
target_mockup_behavior: Compact title, subtitle, status row, and optional page actions that match mockup hierarchy without hero-scale typography.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not introduce production-ready wording for testing, planned, shell-only, preflight, or draft states.

used_by_pages: All gated modules; Settings resources; result/export gates
current_runtime_problem: Existing chips are partially shared, but repeated local labels and chip sizing still create inconsistent status prominence.
target_mockup_behavior: Token-backed semantic chips with optional status icon, tooltip, fixed height, and consistent colors across modules.
must_not_change_semantics: Status semantic key remains authoritative; color/icon must not imply enabled formal capability.

used_by_pages: Dashboard cards; module pages; forms; export gates
current_runtime_problem: Buttons mix native and custom styles; enabled-looking controls can appear under disabled report/export gates.
target_mockup_behavior: Role-based primary, secondary, ghost, danger, and compact actions with clear disabled/adapter-needed states.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not enable executor, report/export, installer, cloud, or file-write behavior through visual refactor.

used_by_pages: Dashboard cards; LabTools entries; Bioinformatics cards; Meta cards; Settings panels
current_runtime_problem: Cards use repeated inline borders and padding, making dashboard, settings, and workflow panels visually unrelated.
target_mockup_behavior: Reusable non-nested card primitive for repeated items and framed tools with 8px-or-less radius and stable padding.
must_not_change_semantics: No nested cards as page sections; repeated items only unless the page truly needs a framed tool.

used_by_pages: Forms; tables; right panels; Settings groups
current_runtime_problem: Section labels are inconsistent in weight, size, and spacing, especially inside dense LabTools and Bioinformatics pages.
target_mockup_behavior: Compact section headings with optional secondary caption and predictable spacing before tables/forms.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not add explanatory design text into the runtime UI.

used_by_pages: Sidebar; module cards; status rows; settings resource rows
current_runtime_problem: Icons are connected through app_identity but their label alignment and fallback handling are page-specific.
target_mockup_behavior: Small icon plus label row with fallback-safe sizing and semantic source metadata.
must_not_change_semantics: Icon presence must not imply a resource is installed or a capability is enabled.

used_by_pages: Dashboard recent projects; Bioinformatics no-result; Meta gates; Settings missing resources
current_runtime_problem: Empty states exist but are not consistently sized, illustrated, or separated from warning/gate notices.
target_mockup_behavior: Shared illustrated empty state with title, concise body, optional disabled action, and semantic empty-state key.
must_not_change_semantics: No fake results, fake reports, fake ready packages, or fake project records.

used_by_pages: Developer Preview notices; gate notices; warning/review notices
current_runtime_problem: Notices vary between labels, raw text blocks, and local warning cards; visual severity is inconsistent.
target_mockup_behavior: Token-backed info/warning/blocker/success banner with compact text, icon slot, and optional action area.
must_not_change_semantics: Warning and gate semantics must remain visible; no formal capability may be softened into success.

used_by_pages: Dashboard; LabTools home; experiment module boundary page
current_runtime_problem: Dashboard and module entry cards have acceptable IA but inconsistent icon scale, status chip placement, and secondary copy density.
target_mockup_behavior: Stable module entry card with icon, title, brief description, status chip, and a single clear entry action.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not expose hidden first-level modules such as external engines, report center, account, or subscription.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics 7-step workflow; Meta 10-step workflow; LabTools reagent/WB flows
current_runtime_problem: Workflow navigation is repeated as lists/tabs and can compress or overlap content on Meta and dense pages.
target_mockup_behavior: Module-local stepper with current, blocked, planned, testing, and completed-draft visual states plus safe disabled routing.
must_not_change_semantics: No step state may imply formal analysis completion or report readiness.

used_by_pages: Settings groups; LabTools calculator/reagent subpages; Bioinformatics auxiliary pages
current_runtime_problem: Internal navigation is inconsistent: tabs, cards, buttons, and stacked lists are mixed per page.
target_mockup_behavior: Compact segmented/tabs control for local page grouping with stable widths and long-label fallback.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not create new runtime routes or activate hidden modules.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics readiness/gate matrices; Meta reference/extraction tables; Settings resources; history lists
current_runtime_problem: Tables are scroll-heavy, native-looking, and often clipped; headers compress scientific labels.
target_mockup_behavior: Read-only table primitive with min column widths, sticky-like header behavior where possible, empty state, and horizontal overflow support.
must_not_change_semantics: Tables must remain read-only unless an existing adapter explicitly allows editing.

used_by_pages: LabTools calculators; reagent forms; Meta question/search forms; Settings forms
current_runtime_problem: Forms use native field spacing and inconsistent label/help/validation placement.
target_mockup_behavior: Label, input, unit/help, validation, and disabled state row that handles scientific units and long labels.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not add persistence or validation side effects beyond existing adapters.

used_by_pages: Dashboard project summary; Bioinformatics project status; Meta protocol summary; right panels
current_runtime_problem: Summary data appears in ad hoc label grids with inconsistent hierarchy.
target_mockup_behavior: Compact key/value rows with status-aware values, copy-safe text, and stable wrapping.
must_not_change_semantics: Values must reflect existing runtime state only; no synthetic readiness or fake result values.

used_by_pages: Dashboard recent projects; LabTools preparation history; Bioinformatics logs; Meta draft history
current_runtime_problem: History and recent-project surfaces are either sparse or visually indistinct from diagnostic text.
target_mockup_behavior: List primitive for recent/draft/history items with timestamp, status, source, and safe empty state.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not create fake history records or mark adapter-needed history as persisted.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics result/report; Meta result/report; LabTools calculator output
current_runtime_problem: Result-like areas mix preflight summaries, draft outputs, and disabled report/export states.
target_mockup_behavior: Panel that clearly separates calculation output, preflight summary, draft report, empty result, and formal-result-disabled states.
must_not_change_semantics: No fake formal DEG, pooled effect, forest plot, report-ready package, or export success.

used_by_pages: LabTools WB warnings; Bioinformatics blockers; Meta gate blockers; Settings missing resources
current_runtime_problem: Warnings appear as paragraphs or table cells, making severity and next action hard to scan.
target_mockup_behavior: Stacked warning rows with severity, source, short reason, and optional safe action/copy affordance.
must_not_change_semantics: Warnings must remain blocking when current semantics are blocking.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics report/export; Meta report/export; analysis task pages; disabled engine panels
current_runtime_problem: Gate messages exist but do not consistently control adjacent buttons, leading to enabled-looking open-file controls under disabled export gates.
target_mockup_behavior: Gate panel/notice that owns disabled action reasons and keeps blocked formats visually tied to the gate.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not enable report/export, external engine execution, or formal analysis.

used_by_pages: LabTools file-picker export pilot; project folder selectors; Settings paths
current_runtime_problem: File picker affordances are visually similar to formal export/report actions.
target_mockup_behavior: Button variant for choose/open local path with explicit local-file semantics and optional adapter-needed note.
must_not_change_semantics: Local picker does not mean report/export readiness or cloud sync.

used_by_pages: Report/export formats; formal run buttons; planned settings actions
current_runtime_problem: Disabled states are inconsistent and sometimes look like ordinary secondary buttons.
target_mockup_behavior: Disabled action primitive with reason tooltip/properties and clear visual affordance for blocked, planned, adapter-needed, and draft-only states.
must_not_change_semantics: Disabled action must remain non-clickable and must not perform file writes or executor calls.

used_by_pages: LabTools general calculator; Bioinformatics data source; Settings resource groups
current_runtime_problem: Two-column pages are built manually and lose proportion when labels wrap or content grows.
target_mockup_behavior: Reusable two-column layout with stable left/right ratios, responsive collapse policy, and shared gutters.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not move capabilities between modules or activate hidden pages.

used_by_pages: LabTools reagent; LabTools WB; Meta screening/extraction; Bioinformatics analysis tasks
current_runtime_problem: Dense workbench pages compress or overflow because three functional regions are not modeled explicitly.
target_mockup_behavior: Left navigation/list, main task surface, and right summary/gate panel with stable min widths and scroll isolation.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not enable additional persistence, export, analysis, or engine calls.

used_by_pages: LabTools reagent templates; Meta extraction forms; Bioinformatics group/design previews
current_runtime_problem: Runtime often places lists, forms, and previews in one scroll, causing first-viewport cropping.
target_mockup_behavior: Dedicated list/form/preview skeleton with independent vertical scroll and fixed preview/action regions.
must_not_change_semantics: Draft/template preview must not become saved record or formal analysis input unless adapter already exists.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics project/readiness; Meta project/gate summaries; LabTools preparation/WB summaries
current_runtime_problem: Right-side summaries are inconsistent or missing, so gate state competes with primary content.
target_mockup_behavior: Fixed-width summary panel for status chips, key blockers, next safe action, and compact diagnostics link.
must_not_change_semantics: Summary must reflect existing state only and must preserve disabled gate reasons.

used_by_pages: Meta full-text/detail review; Bioinformatics source/detail review; future report viewer
current_runtime_problem: Pages that need resizable review/detail regions currently rely on static layouts.
target_mockup_behavior: Splitter-based workbench for source/detail or list/detail review with saved-safe defaults and minimum sizes.
must_not_change_semantics: Splitter state must not alter business records or reviewer decisions.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics analysis tasks; Bioinformatics readiness tables; Settings resource table; Meta reference queues
current_runtime_problem: Dense tables dominate pages without local filters, summaries, or overflow rules.
target_mockup_behavior: Table panel with toolbar, filters/search placeholder, status chips, overflow containment, and empty state.
must_not_change_semantics: Filters/search placeholders must not imply remote execution or data fetch unless already implemented.

used_by_pages: LabTools reagent preparation sheet; WB lane preview; Meta query/report previews; Bio result preview
current_runtime_problem: Preview content is either raw text/table or visually similar to formal output.
target_mockup_behavior: Preview card that labels content as draft, preflight, shell-only, or adapter-needed and separates it from formal output.
must_not_change_semantics: Preview must not look like final report/result/gel/forest plot.

used_by_pages: LabTools WB Loading
current_runtime_problem: WB runtime is clipped and dense; lane preview competes with warnings and forms.
target_mockup_behavior: Compact lane schematic with sample labels, loading volume, warning markers, and no fake gel-band imagery.
must_not_change_semantics: No fake gel bands, band quantification, antibody recommendation, or image analysis execution.

used_by_pages: LabTools BCA/OD future; cell experiment workspace future
current_runtime_problem: Matrix/well layouts are not standardized and future pages risk ad hoc grids.
target_mockup_behavior: Fixed-size 96-well grid with row/column labels, selection states, legend, and data-entry-safe disabled states.
must_not_change_semantics: No ELISA/4PL/formal quantification activation before backend scope is approved.

used_by_pages: Meta screening; Meta import/dedup; full-text management
current_runtime_problem: Reference queues are table-heavy and lack stable queue/detail/reason regions.
target_mockup_behavior: Queue panel with status lanes, selected reference summary, draft decision controls, and blocker/AI-advisory labeling.
must_not_change_semantics: AI suggestions stay advisory; draft decisions are not final inclusion counts.

used_by_pages: Meta full-text/extraction; quality assessment; future evidence tables
current_runtime_problem: Extraction fields and table-like data entry need type-specific structure but runtime surfaces are compressed.
target_mockup_behavior: Schema-aware extraction table shell with section grouping, validation rows, and draft-only save affordance.
must_not_change_semantics: No automatic PDF extraction, final ROB judgment, pooled result, or report-ready input promotion.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics result/report; Meta result/report; future report preview
current_runtime_problem: Current result/report pages mix status, preview, and export controls without a viewer contract.
target_mockup_behavior: Read-only report/draft viewer shell with section navigation, draft watermark/state, and disabled export gate integration.
must_not_change_semantics: No report generation, report-ready status, or export file writes.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics Report Export; Meta Report Export Gate; LabTools export pilot boundaries
current_runtime_problem: Export gates show disabled formats, but some adjacent open-file/folder affordances can mislead.
target_mockup_behavior: Panel that binds readiness checks, disabled format buttons, report artifact presence, and open-file actions to one state model.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not enable DOCX/HTML/PDF/CSV/XLSX/ZIP export or report package generation.

used_by_pages: Bioinformatics result/report; Meta result/report; LabTools image-analysis futures
current_runtime_problem: Plot areas risk looking like real analysis output if styled as finished charts.
target_mockup_behavior: Placeholder that explicitly marks chart/plot as unavailable, planned, draft, or testing summary only.
must_not_change_semantics: No fake forest plot, volcano plot, survival curve, gel band, or publication-bias chart.

used_by_pages: Settings external engines; LabTools image analysis; Bioinformatics/Meta analysis resources
current_runtime_problem: Settings currently reads like a diagnostic inventory and does not separate engine status from ordinary settings.
target_mockup_behavior: Resource/engine panel with detect-only state, path/version, missing/configured badges, and user-confirmed setup actions later.
must_not_change_semantics: Detection does not install, update, delete, upload, enable cloud, or execute engines.

used_by_pages: Settings external resources; developer diagnostics
current_runtime_problem: Resource rows dominate first viewport and lack user-oriented grouping.
target_mockup_behavior: Grouped resource table with ordinary settings first, diagnostics collapsed, and detect-only row semantics.
must_not_change_semantics: No automatic download/install/update/delete or cloud/API key enablement.

used_by_pages: Dashboard recent projects; project home summaries
current_runtime_problem: Recent projects are lightweight and not governed by a table/list contract.
target_mockup_behavior: Compact recent-project table/list with project type, path, last opened, status, and safe open action.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not turn Dashboard into Project Center or create fake records.

used_by_pages: Future onboarding; guided import; long LabTools workflows
current_runtime_problem: Some future multi-step operations will need a constrained wizard rather than freeform dense workbench.
target_mockup_behavior: Wizard shell with step title, progress, validation summary, back/next actions, and cancel boundary.
must_not_change_semantics: No wizard step may bypass existing adapter, gate, or user confirmation requirements.

used_by_pages: Meta screening; Meta extraction; Bioinformatics group/design; export gates
current_runtime_problem: Review/confirmation states are currently scattered across notices and disabled buttons.
target_mockup_behavior: Panel for reviewer confirmation, draft/final distinction, blockers, and explicit safe action state.
must_not_change_semantics: Do not convert draft reviewer actions into final decisions or formal analysis readiness.

used_by_pages: Developer diagnostics; project logs; export/report trace
current_runtime_problem: Logs and diagnostics can leak into ordinary pages or dominate Settings.
target_mockup_behavior: Collapsible audit/log panel with copy/export diagnostics later, separated from ordinary user settings.
must_not_change_semantics: No packaging, LaunchServices, or report/export diagnostics are activated by this component inventory stage.
